test_query_order_api
OQ_001 | 通过订单号精确查询
parameters: {'method': 'POST', 'endpoint': '/hzsx/business/order/queryOrderByCondition', 'case_id': 'OQ_001', 'title': '通过订单号精确查询', 'description': '使用真实存在的订单号进行查询，验证返回唯一记录', 'sql': {'query': "SELECT * FROM llxz_order.ct_user_orders where shop_id='${shop_id}' ORDER BY create_time DESC LIMIT 1", 'column': 'order_id'}, 'json': {'businessType': 1, 'queryType': 'queryPageList', 'requestSource': 'businessNewOfListHeaderStatus', 'isQueryHistory': False, 'pageNumber': 1, 'pageSize': 10, 'orderId': '${order_id}'}, 'expected_status': 200, 'validate_data': [{'path': 'data.records[0].orderId', 'operator': '==', 'value': '${order_id}'}, {'path': 'data.total', 'operator': '>=', 'value': 1}]}

children.name: OQ_002 | 通过不存在的订单号查询
parameters: {'method': 'POST', 'endpoint': '/hzsx/business/order/queryOrderByCondition', 'case_id': 'OQ_002', 'title': '通过不存在的订单号查询', 'description': '使用数据库中不存在的订单号，应返回空列表', 'json': {'businessType': 1, 'queryType': 'queryPageList', 'requestSource': 'businessNewOfListHeaderStatus', 'isQueryHistory': False, 'pageNumber': 1, 'pageSize': 10, 'orderId': '008OI999999999999999999999999'}, 'expected_status': 200, 'validate_data': [{'path': 'data.records', 'operator': '==', 'value': []}, {'path': 'data.total', 'operator': '==', 'value': 0}]}

children.name: OQ_003 | 按订单状态查询（订单完成）
parameters: {'method': 'POST', 'endpoint': '/hzsx/business/order/queryOrderByCondition', 'case_id': 'OQ_003', 'title': '按订单状态查询（订单完成）', 'description': '筛选状态为‘订单完成’的订单', 'json': {'businessType': 1, 'queryType': 'queryPageList', 'requestSource': 'businessNewOfListHeaderStatus', 'isQueryHistory': False, 'pageNumber': 1, 'pageSize': 10, 'status': '09'}, 'expected_status': 200, 'validate_data': [{'path': 'data.records[*].status', 'operator': 'all_in', 'value': ['09']}]}

children.name: OQ_004 | 按责任人查询
parameters: {'method': 'POST', 'endpoint': '/hzsx/business/order/queryOrderByCondition', 'case_id': 'OQ_004', 'title': '按责任人查询', 'description': '通过责任人的姓名模糊匹配订单', 'sql': {'query': 'select id,name from llxz_user.ct_backstage_user order by id DESC LIMIT 1;', 'column_1': 'id', 'column_2': 'name'}, 'json': {'businessType': 1, 'queryType': 'queryPageList', 'requestSource': 'businessNewOfListHeaderStatus', 'isQueryHistory': False, 'pageNumber': 1, 'pageSize': 10, 'guangGaoId': '', 'orderId': '', 'responsiblePersonId': '${id}', 'status': ''}, 'expected_status': 200, 'validate_data': [{'path': 'errorCode', 'operator': '==', 'value': 'None'}, {'path': 'errorMessage', 'operator': '==', 'value': 'None'}]}

children.name: OQ_005 | 按收货人手机号查询
parameters: {'method': 'POST', 'endpoint': '/hzsx/business/order/queryOrderByCondition', 'case_id': 'OQ_005', 'title': '按收货人手机号查询', 'description': '严格匹配收货人手机号（11位）', 'json': {'businessType': 1, 'queryType': 'queryPageList', 'requestSource': 'businessNewOfListHeaderStatus', 'isQueryHistory': False, 'pageNumber': 1, 'pageSize': 10, 'guanGaoId': '', 'telephone': 15705659822}, 'expected_status': 200, 'validate_data': [{'path': 'data.records[*].orderAddressDto.realname', 'operator': 'any_contain', 'value': '陶大帅'}]}

children.name: OQ_006 | 按商品名称模糊查询
parameters: {'method': 'POST', 'endpoint': '/hzsx/business/order/queryOrderByCondition', 'case_id': 'OQ_006', 'title': '按商品名称模糊查询', 'description': '根据商品名称关键字查询订单', 'json': {'businessType': 1, 'queryType': 'queryPageList', 'requestSource': 'businessNewOfListHeaderStatus', 'isQueryHistory': False, 'pageNumber': 1, 'pageSize': 10, 'guanGaoId': '', 'productName': '手机', 'telephone': ''}, 'expected_status': 200, 'validate_data': [{'path': 'data.records[*].productName', 'operator': 'all_contain', 'value': '手机'}]}

children.name: OQ_007 | 按下单人姓名查询
parameters: {'method': 'POST', 'endpoint': '/hzsx/business/order/queryOrderByCondition', 'case_id': 'OQ_007', 'title': '按下单人姓名查询', 'description': '按下单人的真实姓名查询', 'json': {'businessType': 1, 'queryType': 'queryPageList', 'requestSource': 'businessNewOfListHeaderStatus', 'isQueryHistory': False, 'pageNumber': 1, 'pageSize': 10, 'guanGaoId': '', 'userName': '陶玥'}, 'expected_status': 200, 'validate_data': [{'path': 'data.records[*].realName', 'operator': 'all_eq', 'value': '陶玥'}]}

children.name: OQ_008 | 按下单人手机号查询
parameters: {'method': 'POST', 'endpoint': '/hzsx/business/order/queryOrderByCondition', 'case_id': 'OQ_008', 'title': '按下单人手机号查询', 'description': '通过下单人手机号精确查询', 'json': {'businessType': 1, 'queryType': 'queryPageList', 'requestSource': 'businessNewOfListHeaderStatus', 'isQueryHistory': False, 'pageNumber': 1, 'pageSize': 10, 'addressUserPhone': '15705659822', 'guangGaoId': ''}, 'expected_status': 200, 'validate_data': [{'path': 'data.records[*].uid', 'operator': 'all_eq', 'value': '3a5e5a2b822134efbde2fe2292a9995e985bc18evmv4g74rnsfh'}]}

children.name: OQ_010 | 按创建时间范围查询
parameters: {'method': 'POST', 'endpoint': '/hzsx/business/order/queryOrderByCondition', 'case_id': 'OQ_010', 'title': '按创建时间范围查询', 'description': '使用创建时间的起始日期过滤', 'json': {'businessType': 1, 'queryType': 'queryPageList', 'requestSource': 'businessNewOfListHeaderStatus', 'isQueryHistory': False, 'pageNumber': 1, 'pageSize': 10, 'createDate': ['2026-03-31T16:00:00.000Z', '2026-04-29T16:00:00.000Z'], 'createTimeStart': '2026-04-01 00:00:00', 'createTimeEnd': '2026-04-30 00:00:00', 'delivaryCalendar': None, 'guangGaoId': '', 'userName': ''}, 'expected_status': 200, 'validate_data': [{'path': 'data.records', 'operator': 'length_gt', 'value': 0}, {'path': 'data.records[*].placeOrderTime', 'operator': 'all_between', 'value': ['2026-04-01 00:00:00', '2026-04-30 23:59:59']}, {'path': 'data.total', 'operator': '>=', 'value': 0}]}

children.name: OQ_011 | 组合查询：状态 + 下单人姓名 + 订单编号
parameters: {'method': 'POST', 'endpoint': '/hzsx/business/order/queryOrderByCondition', 'case_id': 'OQ_011', 'title': '组合查询：状态 + 下单人姓名 + 订单编号', 'description': '多条件组合查询，验证结果交集', 'json': {'businessType': 1, 'queryType': 'queryPageList', 'requestSource': 'businessNewOfListHeaderStatus', 'isQueryHistory': False, 'pageNumber': 1, 'pageSize': 10, 'status': '09', 'responsiblePersonName': '陶玥', 'orderId': '008OI202604282049064659034574848T'}, 'expected_status': 200, 'validate_data': [{'path': 'data.records[*].status', 'operator': '==', 'value': '09'}, {'path': 'data.records[*].orderId', 'operator': 'in', 'value': '008OI202604282049064659034574848T'}, {'path': 'data.records[*].realName', 'operator': 'in', 'value': '陶玥'}, {'path': 'data.total', 'operator': '==', 'value': 1}, {'path': 'errorMessage', 'operator': '==', 'value': 'None'}]}

children.name: OQ_012 | 分页查询：第二页数据
parameters: {'method': 'POST', 'endpoint': '/hzsx/business/order/queryOrderByCondition', 'case_id': 'OQ_012', 'title': '分页查询：第二页数据', 'description': '验证分页参数正常工作', 'json': {'businessType': 1, 'queryType': 'queryPageList', 'requestSource': 'businessNewOfListHeaderStatus', 'isQueryHistory': False, 'pageNumber': 2, 'pageSize': 5, 'addressUserPhone': '', 'orderId': ''}, 'expected_status': 200, 'validate_data': [{'path': 'data.current', 'operator': '==', 'value': 2}, {'path': 'data.size', 'operator': '<=', 'value': 5}, {'path': 'data.records', 'operator': 'type', 'value': 'list'}]}

children.name: OQ_013 | 按创建时间降序排序
parameters: {'method': 'POST', 'endpoint': '/hzsx/business/order/queryOrderByCondition', 'case_id': 'OQ_013', 'title': '按创建时间降序排序', 'description': '默认排序应为 create_time DESC，验证第一条记录时间晚于最后一条', 'sql': {'query': "select DATE_FORMAT(create_time, '%%Y-%%m-%%d %%H:%%i:%%s') as create_time from llxz_order.ct_user_orders where shop_id='${shop_id}' ORDER BY create_time DESC LIMIT 1;", 'column': 'create_time'}, 'json': {'businessType': 1, 'queryType': 'queryPageList', 'requestSource': 'businessNewOfListHeaderStatus', 'isQueryHistory': False, 'pageNumber': 1, 'pageSize': 10}, 'expected_status': 200, 'custom_validate': 'check_create_time_desc', 'validate_data': [{'path': 'data.records[0].orderAddressDto.createTime', 'operator': '==', 'value': '${create_time}'}]}

children.name: OQ_014 | 空查询条件（不传任何筛选）
parameters: {'method': 'POST', 'endpoint': '/hzsx/business/order/queryOrderByCondition', 'case_id': 'OQ_014', 'title': '空查询条件（不传任何筛选）', 'description': '查询全部订单，应返回分页数据', 'json': {'businessType': 1, 'queryType': 'queryPageList', 'requestSource': 'businessNewOfListHeaderStatus', 'isQueryHistory': False, 'pageNumber': 1, 'pageSize': 10}, 'expected_status': 200, 'validate_data': [{'path': 'data.records', 'operator': 'type', 'value': 'list'}, {'path': 'data.searchCount', 'operator': '==', 'value': True}]}

children.name: OQ_015 | 订单查询--高分专享
parameters: {'method': 'POST', 'endpoint': '/hzsx/business/order/queryOrderByCondition', 'case_id': 'OQ_015', 'title': '订单查询--高分专享', 'description': '订单查询--高分专享单条件查询', 'json': {'businessType': 1, 'queryType': 'queryPageList', 'requestSource': 'businessNewOfListHeaderStatus', 'isQueryHistory': False, 'pageNumber': 1, 'pageSize': 10, 'discountType': '1', 'guangGaoId': ''}, 'expected_status': 200, 'validate_data': [{'path': '$.responseType', 'operator': '==', 'value': 'SUCCESS'}, {'path': '$.errorMessage', 'operator': '==', 'value': None}, {'path': '$.data.records[0].customizeLabelDtos[0].labelName', 'operator': '==', 'value': '高分专享'}]}

children.name: OQ_016 | 订单查询--芝麻严选
parameters: {'method': 'POST', 'endpoint': '/hzsx/business/order/queryOrderByCondition', 'case_id': 'OQ_016', 'title': '订单查询--芝麻严选', 'description': '订单查询--芝麻严选单条件查询', 'json': {'businessType': 1, 'queryType': 'queryPageList', 'requestSource': 'businessNewOfListHeaderStatus', 'isQueryHistory': False, 'pageNumber': 1, 'pageSize': 10, 'discountType': '12', 'guangGaoId': ''}, 'expected_status': 200, 'validate_data': [{'path': '$.responseType', 'operator': '==', 'value': 'SUCCESS'}, {'path': '$.errorMessage', 'operator': '==', 'value': None}, {'path': '$.data.records[0].customizeLabelDtos[0].labelName', 'operator': '==', 'value': '芝麻严选'}]}

children.name: OQ_017 | 订单查询--起租日期+续租订单
parameters: {'method': 'POST', 'endpoint': '/hzsx/business/order/queryOrderByCondition', 'case_id': 'OQ_017', 'title': '订单查询--起租日期+续租订单', 'description': '验证订单查询接口中，起租日期在最近一个月内的续租订单', 'json': {'businessType': 1, 'queryType': 'queryPageList', 'requestSource': 'businessNewOfListHeaderStatus', 'isQueryHistory': False, 'pageNumber': 1, 'pageSize': 10, 'createDate': None, 'guangGaoId': '', 'discountType': '13', 'rentStartBegin': '${start_date}', 'rentStartEnd': '${end_date}', 'startingrentDate': ['${start_date_iso}', '${end_date_iso}']}, 'expected_status': 200, 'validate_data': [{'path': '$.responseType', 'operator': '==', 'value': 'SUCCESS'}, {'path': '$.errorMessage', 'operator': '==', 'value': None}, {'path': '$.data.total', 'operator': '>=', 'value': 0}, {'path': '$.data.records[0].customizeLabelDtos[0].labelName', 'operator': '==', 'value': '续租订单', 'only_if': '$.data.total > 0'}]}

children.name: test_repair_order_api
补订单接口-正常流程测试
RO_002 | 缺少订单ID
test_status_count_api
OST_001 | 验证全部订单统计
parameters:
{'method': 'GET', 'endpoint': '/hzsx/business/order/countOrderStatus', 'case_id': 'OST_001', 'title': '验证全部订单统计', 'description': '查询当前店铺所有订单数量，与接口返回的 status=00 的 total 比较', 'params': {'requestSource': 'businessNewOfListHeaderStatus'}, 'sql': {'query': "SELECT COUNT(*) as total_count
FROM llxz_order.ct_user_orders
WHERE shop_id = '${shop_id}'
    AND channel_id IN ('004', '007', '008', '009', '011', '012', '085')
    AND rent_start IS NOT NULL
    AND (delete_time IS NULL OR delete_time <= '2001-01-01 00:00:00');
", 'column': 'total_count'}, 'expected_status': 200, 'validate_data': [{'path': "data[?(@.status=='00')].total", 'operator': '==', 'value': '${total_count}'}]}

children.name: OST_002 | 验证待支付订单统计
parameters:
{'method': 'GET', 'endpoint': '/hzsx/business/order/countOrderStatus', 'case_id': 'OST_002', 'title': '验证待支付订单统计', 'description': "状态为待支付（status='01'）的订单数量", 'params': {'requestSource': 'businessNewOfListHeaderStatus'}, 'sql': {'query': "SELECT status, count(*) as total_count
FROM llxz_order.ct_user_orders
WHERE (shop_id = '${shop_id}' AND
       channel_id IN ('004', '007', '008', '009', '011', '012', '085') AND rent_start IS NOT NULL AND
       (delete_time <= '2001-01-01 00:00:00' OR delete_time IS NULL)) and status ='01'
", 'column': 'total_count'}, 'expected_status': 200, 'validate_data': [{'path': "data[?(@.status=='01')].total", 'operator': '==', 'value': '${total_count}'}]}

children.name: OST_003 | 验证待审核订单统计
parameters:
{'method': 'GET', 'endpoint': '/hzsx/business/order/countOrderStatus', 'case_id': 'OST_003', 'title': '验证待审核订单统计', 'description': "状态为待审核（status='13'）的订单数量", 'params': {'requestSource': 'businessNewOfListHeaderStatus'}, 'sql': {'query': "SELECT status, count(*) as total_count
FROM llxz_order.ct_user_orders
WHERE (shop_id = '${shop_id}' AND
       channel_id IN ('004', '007', '008', '009', '011', '012', '085') AND rent_start IS NOT NULL AND
       (delete_time <= '2001-01-01 00:00:00' OR delete_time IS NULL)) and status IN ('13','14')
", 'column': 'total_count'}, 'expected_status': 200, 'validate_data': [{'path': "data[?(@.status=='11')].total", 'operator': '==', 'value': '${total_count}'}]}

children.name: OST_004 | 验证待发货订单统计
parameters:
{'method': 'GET', 'endpoint': '/hzsx/business/order/countOrderStatus', 'case_id': 'OST_004', 'title': '验证待发货订单统计', 'description': "状态为待发货（status='04'）的订单数量", 'params': {'requestSource': 'businessNewOfListHeaderStatus'}, 'sql': {'query': "SELECT status, count(*) as total_count

", 'column': 'total_count'}, 'expected_status': 200, 'validate_data': [{'path': "data[?(@.status=='04')].total", 'operator': '==', 'value': '${total_count}'}]}

parameters:
{'method': 'GET', 'endpoint': '/hzsx/business/order/countOrderStatus', 'case_id': 'OST_005', 'title': '验证待确认收货订单统计', 'description': "状态为待确认收货（status='05'）的订单数量", 'params': {'requestSource': 'businessNewOfListHeaderStatus'}, 'sql': {'query': "SELECT status, count(*) as total_count

parameters:
{'method': 'GET', 'endpoint': '/hzsx/business/order/countOrderStatus', 'case_id': 'OST_006', 'title': '验证租用中订单统计', 'description': "状态为租用中（status='06'）的订单数量", 'params': {'requestSource': 'businessNewOfListHeaderStatus'}, 'sql': {'query': "SELECT status, count(*) as total_count

", 'column': 'total_count'}, 'expected_status': 200, 'validate_data': [{'path': "data[?(@.status=='06')].total", 'operator': '==', 'value': '${total_count}'}]}

parameters:
{'method': 'GET', 'endpoint': '/hzsx/business/order/countOrderStatus', 'case_id': 'OST_007', 'title': '验证待结算订单统计', 'description': "状态为待结算（status='07'）的订单数量", 'params': {'requestSource': 'businessNewOfListHeaderStatus'}, 'sql': {'query': "SELECT status, count(*) as total_count
FROM llxz_order.ct_user_orders

parameters:
{'method': 'GET', 'endpoint': '/hzsx/business/order/countOrderStatus', 'case_id': 'OST_008', 'title': '验证订单完成统计', 'description': "状态为订单完成（status='09'）的订单数量", 'params': {'requestSource': 'businessNewOfListHeaderStatus'}, 'sql': {'query': "SELECT status, count(*) as total_count
FROM llxz_order.ct_user_orders
WHERE (shop_id = '${shop_id}' AND
       channel_id IN ('004', '007', '008', '009', '011', '012', '085') AND rent_start IS NOT NULL AND
       (delete_time <= '2001-01-01 00:00:00' OR delete_time IS NULL)) and status ='09'
", 'column': 'total_count'}, 'expected_status': 200, 'validate_data': [{'path': "data[?(@.status=='09')].total", 'operator': '==', 'value': '${total_count}'}]}

children.name: OST_009 | 验证待归还订单统计
parameters:
{'method': 'GET', 'endpoint': '/hzsx/business/order/countOrderStatus', 'case_id': 'OST_009', 'title': '验证待归还订单统计', 'description': "状态为待归还（status='06'|'07'|unrent_time >当日期时间）的订单数量", 'params': {'requestSource': 'businessNewOfListHeaderStatus'}, 'sql': {'query': "SELECT COUNT(*) as total_count
FROM llxz_order.ct_user_orders
WHERE shop_id = '${shop_id}'
  AND channel_id IN ('004', '007', '008', '009', '011', '012', '085')
  AND rent_start IS NOT NULL
  AND (delete_time IS NULL OR delete_time <= '2001-01-01 00:00:00')
  AND status IN ('06')
  AND unrent_time < NOW();
", 'column': 'total_count'}, 'expected_status': 200, 'validate_data': [{'path': "data[?(@.status=='12')].total", 'operator': '==', 'value': '${total_count}'}]}

children.name: OST_010 | 验证归还中订单统计
parameters:
{'method': 'GET', 'endpoint': '/hzsx/business/order/countOrderStatus', 'case_id': 'OST_010', 'title': '验证归还中订单统计', 'description': "状态为归还中（status='19'）的订单数量", 'params': {'requestSource': 'businessNewOfListHeaderStatus'}, 'sql': {'query': "SELECT count(*) as total_count
FROM llxz_order.ct_user_orders
WHERE (shop_id = '${shop_id}' AND
      channel_id IN ('004', '007', '008', '009', '011', '012', '085') AND rent_start IS NOT NULL AND
      (delete_time <= '2001-01-01 00:00:00' OR delete_time IS NULL)) AND `status` IN ('07') AND return_time IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY status;
", 'column': 'total_count'}, 'expected_status': 200, 'validate_data': [{'path': "data[?(@.status=='19')].total", 'operator': '==', 'value': '${total_count}'}]}

children.name: OST_011 | 验证已逾期订单统计
parameters:
{'method': 'GET', 'endpoint': '/hzsx/business/order/countOrderStatus', 'case_id': 'OST_011', 'title': '验证已逾期订单统计', 'description': "状态为已逾期（status='20'）的订单数量", 'params': {'requestSource': 'businessNewOfListHeaderStatus'}, 'sql': {'query': "SELECT count(*) AS total_count
FROM llxz_order.ct_user_orders
WHERE(shop_id = '${shop_id}'
		AND channel_id IN ( '004', '007', '008', '009', '011', '012', '085' )
		AND rent_start IS NOT NULL
	AND ( delete_time <= '2001-01-01 00:00:00' OR delete_time IS NULL ))
	AND `status` IN ( '06', '07', '08', '12' )
	AND is_violation = '04'
GROUP BY STATUS;
", 'column': 'total_count'}, 'expected_status': 200, 'validate_data': [{'path': "data[?(@.status=='20')].total", 'operator': '==', 'value': '${total_count}'}]}

children.name: OST_012 | 验证今日未还订单统计
parameters:
{'method': 'GET', 'endpoint': '/hzsx/business/order/countOrderStatus', 'case_id': 'OST_012', 'title': '验证今日未还订单统计', 'description': '今日未还：租用中且应还日期小于等于今日且未实际归还（需根据业务调整条件）', 'params': {'requestSource': 'businessNewOfListHeaderStatus'}, 'sql': {'query': "SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT cobs.order_id) AS total_count
FROM llxz_order.ct_user_orders AS cuo
INNER JOIN llxz_order.ct_order_by_stages AS cobs ON cobs.order_id = cuo.order_id
WHERE
cobs.statement_date >= CURDATE()
AND cobs.statement_date < DATE_ADD(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 1 DAY)
AND cobs.STATUS IN (1)
AND cuo.STATUS IN ('06', '07')
AND cuo.is_violation IN ('01', '03')
AND cobs.shop_id = '${shop_id}';
", 'column': 'total_count'}, 'expected_status': 200, 'validate_data': [{'path': "data[?(@.status=='21')].total", 'operator': '==', 'value': '${total_count}'}]}

children.name: OST_013 | 验证今日已还订单统计
parameters:
{'method': 'GET', 'endpoint': '/hzsx/business/order/countOrderStatus', 'case_id': 'OST_013', 'title': '验证今日已还订单统计', 'description': "今日已还：今日内实际归还的订单（status='22'）", 'params': {'requestSource': 'businessNewOfListHeaderStatus'}, 'sql': {'query': "SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT re.order_id) AS total_count
FROM (
SELECT DISTINCT bs.order_id
FROM llxz_order.ct_order_by_stages bs
LEFT JOIN llxz_order.ct_user_orders uo ON bs.order_id = uo.order_id
WHERE bs.repayment_date >= CURDATE()
    AND bs.repayment_date < DATE_ADD(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 1 DAY)
    AND uo.STATUS IN ('06', '09')
    AND NOT EXISTS (
        SELECT 1
        FROM llxz_order.ct_order_by_stages bse
        WHERE bse.order_id = bs.order_id AND bse.STATUS = '4'
    )
    AND uo.shop_id = '${shop_id}'

UNION ALL

SELECT DISTINCT bs.order_id
FROM llxz_order.ct_order_by_stages bs
LEFT JOIN llxz_order.ct_user_orders uo ON bs.order_id = uo.order_id
LEFT JOIN llxz_order.ct_order_by_stages_part sp ON bs.id = sp.periods_id
WHERE sp.create_time >= CURDATE()
    AND sp.create_time < DATE_ADD(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 1 DAY)
    AND bs.STATUS IN ('1', '2')
    AND uo.STATUS IN ('06', '09')
    AND sp.STATUS = '3'
    AND NOT EXISTS (
        SELECT 1
        FROM llxz_order.ct_order_by_stages bse
        WHERE bse.order_id = bs.order_id AND bse.STATUS = '4'
    )
    AND uo.shop_id = '${shop_id}'
    ) re;
", 'column': 'total_count'}, 'expected_status': 200, 'validate_data': [{'path': "data[?(@.status=='22')].total", 'operator': '==', 'value': '${total_count}'}]}

children.name: OST_014 | 验证明日到期订单统计
parameters:
{'method': 'GET', 'endpoint': '/hzsx/business/order/countOrderStatus', 'case_id': 'OST_014', 'title': '验证明日到期订单统计', 'description': "明日到期：租用中且应还日期为明天（status='23'）", 'params': {'requestSource': 'businessNewOfListHeaderStatus'}, 'sql': {'query': "SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT cobs.order_id) AS total_count
FROM llxz_order.ct_user_orders AS cuo
INNER JOIN llxz_order.ct_order_by_stages AS cobs ON cobs.order_id = cuo.order_id
WHERE cobs.statement_date BETWEEN CONCAT( CURDATE() + INTERVAL 1 DAY, ' 00:00:00' )
                              AND CONCAT( CURDATE() + INTERVAL 1 DAY, ' 23:59:59' )
  AND cobs.STATUS = 1
  AND cuo.STATUS IN ( '06', '07' )
  AND cuo.is_violation IN ( '01', '03' )
  AND cobs.shop_id = '${shop_id}'
", 'column': 'total_count'}, 'expected_status': 200, 'validate_data': [{'path': "data[?(@.status=='23')].total", 'operator': '==', 'value': '${total_count}'}]}
